I can schedule that, but 10:00–11:00 on 2024-05-19 is already booked (Project Kick-off). I found these free 1-hour slots that day:

- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30
- 14:00–15:00 (or another afternoon time if you prefer)

Before I create the event, please confirm the following (or tell me any changes):

1. Which time do you want from the options above? (If none, tell me a preferred time range.)  
2. Event title — default: "Follow-up Meeting".  
3. Short description — suggested: "One-hour follow-up to review progress and next steps." (You can edit.)  
4. Who should be invited? (List emails; your calendar will be included automatically: emma.johnson@bluesparrowtech.com.)  
5. Location (optional) — e.g., Office 44A, Zoom, or leave blank.

Once you confirm, I’ll create the 1-hour event and notify participants.
